Product Creation Code – Planning Guide
Product Creation
Planning Guide
This short guide is designed to help you start mapping out ideas for the types of products
you would like to bring to market.
1. What types of products are you interested in creating that you feel your
market would buy (based on market research)?
¨ E-book / special report
¨ Online / home study course
¨ Membership site (Continuity Program)
¨ Webinar / teleseminar series
¨ Software
¨ Physical product
¨ Coaching / Consulting
¨ Live Events
¨ Other ___________________________
